analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a focus on animated objects and slides. The current state includes basic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files, but they need to be enhanced to fully support the black hole theme with animated objects and slides. The CSS file should include cosmic and dark themes with animations, and the JavaScript file should handle the animations and interactions effectively.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the theme is cohesive and immersive.

Update the JavaScript file to include improved mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions. Ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
